name: Kyrsten
subject: I wouldn't be asking if it weren't important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
| | | Friend, I'm reaching out to say thanks for all of your support over the past few days. We knew the attacks would come eventually -- but that doesn't make it any easier to bear now that they're here.

I know you believe in what we're fighting for just as much as I do. That's why I'm relying heavily on you to keep up our grassroots momentum.

We're still short of our Rapid Response Fund goal, and the money we need in order to keep up with the attacks must be in the bank by tomorrow morning. Can you help out with a contribution today?

Here's a special link from my team -- **_[http://act.kyrstensinema.com/rapid-response-fund](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-media-offense?recurring=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+httpactkyrstensinemacomrapidresponsefund&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3")_**

My opponents have powerful friends and contributors, but their dollars are no match for this grassroots team when we're firing on all cylinders.

There's so much at stake in this election, and I want you to know that I'm as committed as ever to finding solutions to the challenges facing everyday Arizona families.

I'm looking forward to the months ahead, and I'm grateful to have you on my team.

Right now, I really need you to help us meet our Rapid Response Fund goal by tomorrow morning so we can fight back against the attacks. Can you make a contribution today to keep us moving forward?

Again, here's the link: **_[http://act.kyrstensinema.com/rapid-response-fund](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-media-offense?recurring=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+httpactkyrstensinemacomrapidresponsefund&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3")_**

Thank you for everything. Talk soon.

Kyrsten

|
---|---|---

|
---

Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
Kyrsten is running for the United States Senate because she wants to help Arizonans get their shot at the American dream. She's spent her career fighting for veterans and military families, listening to the middle class, and doing her part to fix a broken Washington.

She can't win this race without support from people like you. You can donate to Sinema for Arizona by [clicking here](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&amount=7&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3"). Still support Kyrsten but want fewer emails? [Click here](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0d94/45aebd3c/4b4e1b6f/2ca95745/113081353/VEsC/ "http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3") to receive fewer emails from our campaign. And if you'd like to unsubscribe from our list, [click here.](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0d94/45aebd3c/4b4e1b6f/2ca95746/113081353/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0YjRlMWI2ZiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjU5NWQwZDk0In0=/ "http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/oneclickunsubscribe/4b4e1b6f/595d0d94?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=5+-+click+here&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180624_2_3")

PO Box 7586 Phoenix, AZ 85011

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: AZ-01 rejects Joe Arpaio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Families in our district deserve better than Joe Arpaio, and they deserve better than Tom's far-right opponents.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633900/1a8421e1/1a440df87/4bccc81b/1739304075/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")

Friends, **One of Tom 's far-right opponents is BRAGGING about the fact that Joe Arpaio endorsed him.** That's right, _former sheriff_ Joe Arpaio -- _the extreme, convicted criminal whose right-wing politics and toxic rhetoric are an embarrassment to Arizona families._ **Families in our district deserve better than Joe Arpaio, and they deserve better than Tom 's far-right opponents.** [**Make a donation right now so we can send a message: AZ-01 REJECTS Joe Arpaio and his terrible politics >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. name: Donna Edwards
subject: Together, we can win
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff36/767134fb/5f4d5bc1/43384e1d/1284079013/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi Friend, I want to thank you for your support throughout my campaign for County Executive. We are less than 48 hours from the Primary and I couldn't have made it this far without the grassroots coalition of activists, labor groups, and social justice partners who I have fought alongside for so many years. **My campaign relies on the grassroots support of people like you--not from big developers who are funding my opponent. I 'll be honest with you: this is an extremely close race and we need your support to win. In these final days of my race, I'm asking for your help one last time to ensure a victory.** **[Can you make a contribution of $10 or more by midnight tonight to assist with the final days of our get out the vote efforts?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff36/767134fb/5f4d5bc1/43384e1a/1284079013/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** Our counties and states deserve leaders who will implement policies that will benefit our most vulnerable communities such as paid sick leave and raising the minimum wage for low-wage workers. I was one of those leaders while in Congress and I have what it takes to do the same as Prince George's County Executive.**[With your help, we can win on Tuesday. Will you donate $10 or whatever you can to assist with the final days of GOTV?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff36/767134fb/5f4d5bc1/43384e1a/1284079013/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-website?refcode=website")** Thank you again for your continued support. Together, we can win this. Donna
---
|
---
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff36/767134fb/5f4d5bc1/43384e1b/1284079013/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/donnafernedwards/") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff36/767134fb/5f4d5bc1/43384e18/1284079013/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/donnafedwards") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff36/767134fb/5f4d5bc1/43384e19/1284079013/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/donnafedwards/")

Authority: Donna for Prince George's, Glenn Ivey, Treasurer

P.O. Box 44343
Fort Washington, MD 20749

[Unsubscribe](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff36/767134fb/5f4d5bc1/43384e16/1284079013/VEsB/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/unsubscribe")

name: The White House
subject: When separation is permanent
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=307ab97dc387c18fb9d323040fcb12ec5b68b2cf606973c52b40ec6b21678783a0b323df81ebb0741b5fdd498a96131fd12ed42ff541367b

The White House - June 25, 2018

The Day Ahead

President Donald J. Trump and the First Lady will welcome Their Majesties King Abdullah II bin Al-Hussein and Queen Rania Al Abdullah of Jordan to the White House.

When separation is permanent

Joshua Wilkerson was 18 years old. "His last hours were—was brutal," his mother Laura said, describing in painful detail the horrific circumstances of her son's murder. "As everyone standing up here, none of our kids had a minute to say goodbye."

For these angel families, all of whom lost loved ones because of crime spilling across our border, President Trump vowed on Friday to keep fighting to restore rule of law. "According to a 2011 government report, the arrests attached to the criminal alien population included an estimated 25,000 people for homicide, 42,000 for robbery, nearly 70,000 for sex offenses, and nearly 15,000 for kidnapping," the President said.

"You hear the other side. You never hear this side," President Trump said. "No major networks sent cameras to their homes or displayed the images of their incredible loved ones across the nightly news. They don't do that." Instead, their suffering was met with silence.

Sabine Durden's story is worth remembering. "I'm one of your legal immigrants," she said at the White House on Friday. "It took me five years to become a citizen, a proud citizen." But when a criminal from Guatemala who didn't go through that same vetting process—and then was protected by a sanctuary city—took her son's life, her words were heartbreaking. "I couldn't protect him."

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=307ab97dc387c18f73c92b3f9caaa618db83c97a7934c88c43becdf85c913f2355342022a183d478d991a5ad35e4d61ca8ea612c00b9d197
Learn more about the angel families President Trump met with on Friday.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8f9ca03dd0620be38cc5056a681747cbaa7d572c9af4acd43612d088d77d7b5ae6cb30b5831c835091b69edb312ac634e4e60e3b59f9547
The President's weekly address on how our immigration system is broken.

Ending the Human Rights Council farce

The United Nations Humans Rights Council (HRC) has failed to live up to its purpose, serving as a shield for human rights violators and a megaphone for unfair bias against Israel. Countries with terrible human rights records are routinely elected to the HRC, and it has passed more resolutions condemning Israel than it has condemning Syria, Iran, and North Korea combined.

This Administration has taken steps to advance the cause of reform. Yet even simple efficiency proposals aimed at dealing with the Council's budget crisis have failed to win enough support. If real reforms are undertaken, America would welcome the opportunity to re-engage.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8f9ca03dd0620bed74370de81ac6d33a38a083d0dcf6c0b79dae84cf4b99ffce1f4dbc36c3c593dc305349408971b4f219ebdd1490c14db
Learn more about the Administration's decision to leave the HRC.

Photo of the Day

Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks

President Donald J. Trump participates in a roundtable discussion on tax reform
| June 23, 2018

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8f9ca03dd0620be7cdd19d590cb18977e4d244343392f5711133c1437748312ffa635f3e6d22f2bc37a2cba57b3ea82b7d81d8138d9cc6b
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=e8f9ca03dd0620bef340e355b3c0c0607c1257d1451629587e5a0626dd1e6d2742527e4ca34df84a92ee78aea5e0e3abfa73dcae3b8866fa
Contact the White House |

Unsubscribe

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Grassroots Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Dear Friend,

It's been another fast week across West Virginia for Team Manchin. Most notably, we celebrated our great state's 155th birthday on Wednesday. As Joe frequently says, our state has mined the coal that forged the steel that built the great tanks and ships that have kept our country the strongest in the nation. We are a state of strong people, beautiful scenery and friendly gatherings - and you can see this in our many fairs and festivals. Last weekend, Joe spent time with friends at Coalton Days in Randolph County and visited with West Virginians across other areas of the state.

New Poll

Monmouth University released [new polling ](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC457kkjv9LkTj2Gnge38I0QwnvBGksDPN%2b7B1gJ%2b6TgwXf4RNUSb3S9ExlTYkHea84GxbJAurR1odrGdVxgHzCa5qhS%2bYQxPa9TxVrja5ZOV3wOUQX0XJ6dFjJSHzTT57Tf97%2boN5Rrk4GiKFePmd4Youxz7NbyHE8w%3d%3d)showing Joe with a 9-point lead over Morrisey. This is now the fourth consecutive poll that has Joe with a commanding lead.

Stop Morrisey's Attacks on Pre-Existing Conditions - this could impact you or your family!

Attorney General Patrick Morrisey joined a federal lawsuit to allow insurance companies to deny coverage for people with pre-existing conditions. 800,000 West Virginians have common pre-existing conditions like diabetes, high blood pressure, or heart disease. Morrisey wants to throw out protections for pre-existing conditions.

**[CLICK HERE: Sign the petition to tell Patrick Morrisey to stop attacking people with pre-existing conditions.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC46zO8q5nDP2CquP9NCfAQmhzE5jkrIEv7G3ibgT9cvbIpN4xgdvIRa5rsHB%2fx4Zrl8VXs9zdoiq0r6RKtFLpT9%2fgOJ3VXu5dXQ%3d%3d)**

Joe In The News

Exponent-Telegram: [Manchin, clergy meet to discuss pre-existing conditions and health care](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC42K2HtSUxON14Dvkkrs9VaEUzy%2buLbeVEhwlkmhpVEFgNBpRqy4A4oBBMHBcZ1LFACSkJXqZNRNaPiu%2fkpiI4uFVifsUYsCGSQt7sfeX8ozh6JuklSF5%2f4xMFzk8v3W5MdctOlUqUF7YHjzkJerFHN7IAXPJCvlW7UnxXT5KU%2frVt3sbcSTyn45V24TacKz%2bLdOnUq2XtR9FmzIuEG30EMDd6xOmBQfb24EFWoKjKs1UyVTV4j%2fOri6f06BVqazuL8%2fxqotOiImE)

Darick Biondi, a United Methodist pastor at three different locations in Kanawha County, said the issue of pre-existing conditions was something he and his wife personally faced before the Affordable Care Act was implemented. They discovered that if she were to become pregnant, her private insurance would not cover any health care related to the child before its birth, and a company that would have covered it denied her due to pre-existing conditions.

WDVM TV: [Manchin holds roundtable with religious leaders (VIDEO)](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftm1PJjlt52GwEnxru%2f%2bkUEpM7sa9ICw92XFB7QNbRexSCegJB69u4H4y612ottjyB4rEgEU0M%2fYP%2bFbhi4f%2bBL5FUA7%2bb2QGEs%3d)

CNN: [Joe Manchin leads Republican opponent in new West Virginia Senate poll](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC48G5Get2gr3lo0Ea2Jr%2bdkMF9sHEo5qEwf4HSblYHZoDrmeBSqJIefXvdbj8cTFShQTc6RomjM%2b6bAds0QIMUZKNX6p0FHYGowwwubcgfI0Vx7xkCGIQsmzyb%2by7FwcEkzUXHm1rYM%2b2mwqDsG44hvwz5eCaMeI3r7gMM1KNGdYE17yymuaACcPIc7hojFUEzA%3d%3d)

Thanks,

Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
---

P.O. Box 5202
Charleston, WV 25361
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC457kkjv9LkTjvDXRuLbXMKT3SLPHL8f66seeqvDN0HKv0yZtvicTJBHji0Rx3fpXm%2fh2PIGbpA56ZmM8ZFXvbp1NGeD8qcDsppJfQufYNAiO%2f3aS9exDIfku75xeQZf0xQzF%2fj3LW2%2fOmBuhbzO9YjrwHx7nWiZZWbI2AqgPsw77E3twtFw7HQ4XH2T%2ftO1%2fcVsv2sH%2bsYiEDr7eckTzHMfqkYS%2f2j3ZxW0oOwr40Eu5NdRlY2iQPUE%3d)

Fellow Democrat,
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1488214/8041691/-649759741?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODkzN2Q2Yy04Zjc4LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpjaPirh6C5PNDL3hGioel_Xdc45c2wHLop13B7q1bc=)** to tell Patrick Morrisey to STOP the attack on people with pre-existing conditions!
Morrisey wants to throw out protections for people with pre-existing conditions. **_800,000 West Virginians have pre-existing conditions like diabetes, high blood pressure, or heart disease. _**If Morrisey wins in court, insurance companies will be able to deny coverage to those West Virginians.
The only way to stop him is to[ **sign this petition**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1488215/8041692/-649759741?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODkzN2Q2Yy04Zjc4LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpjaPirh6C5PNDL3hGioel_Xdc45c2wHLop13B7q1bc=) and stand up against Morrisey's corruption.
We can't let Patrick Morrisey throw West Virginians to the wolves and sell out our state to big insurance companies.
**Forward this message on to five friends, and tell them we need their help too! **
SIGN YOUR NAME HERE: [http://www.stopmorrisey.com/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1488216/8041693/-649759741?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODkzN2Q2Yy04Zjc4LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VpjaPirh6C5PNDL3hGioel_Xdc45c2wHLop13B7q1bc=)

name: Shelbie Konkel, Davis for Kansas
subject: I love coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/POhsAR-n5WsU7EmOozuEp5ERKZA53anreDrMnUbH29k=/GRjva-GSVG2FVLn_K1v0UqMLuu_fONeQpfeWBgxlCeI=?gpsid=13_36_1550&refcode=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_ful__SK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_ful__SK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Peter,

I love my daily cup of coffee.

Seriously. There's nothing better than that first sip from my favorite coffee shop in the morning. It makes even the worst days seem just a little better.

But if I could give up my daily coffee to help elect a new Congressman who would fight for everyday people like you and me instead of billionaires or corporations, I would do it in a heartbeat. And that's all we need from you -- the cost of a cup of coffee.

**[Peter, can you chip in just a few bucks to help us with our huge end-of-quarter fundraising goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/POhsAR-n5WsU7EmOozuEp5ERKZA53anreDrMnUbH29k=/GRjva-GSVG2FVLn_K1v0UqMLuu_fONeQpfeWBgxlCeI=?gpsid=13_36_1550&refcode=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_ful__SK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_ful__SK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

This is one of those deadlines where our fundraising totals are released to the public -- so everyone will judge how strong our campaign is based on the numbers we release at the end of the month.

If everyone chipped in the cost of a latte, we'd smash through this goal in no time at all. I'll even skip my cup of coffee tomorrow morning to help us reach this goal.

**[Will you do the same? Chip in the cost of your coffee (or tea, or soda) right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/POhsAR-n5WsU7EmOozuEp5ERKZA53anreDrMnUbH29k=/GRjva-GSVG2FVLn_K1v0UqMLuu_fONeQpfeWBgxlCeI=?gpsid=13_36_1550&refcode=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_ful__SK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_ful__SK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Shelbie Konkel
Finance Director

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Heather Coil, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Campaign update: Crypto, new ad, media, immigration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, We are celebrating another great week! We are getting closer to the primary every day. In fact, there are less than 50 days left. We are so grateful for all of your support. There’s simply no way we could have gotten this far without your help. Please be sure to check your email tomorrow morning. Austin is writing an important email today that he would like you to read. **New campaign Second Amendment ad:** We released a new ad last week featuring Josh Hawley’s big mistake on the Second Amendment. You may recall that Josh Hawley came out in favor of new gun control measures after the Parkland shooting. Students from March for Our Lives held rallies in St.Louis and Kansas City last week, and were likely pleased to know that Claire McCaskill and Josh Hawley BOTH support gun control. We can’t risk electing someone that will change their mind when popular opinion changes from one day to the next. Austin has pledged to stand firm on the Second Amendment and is the only candidate we can trust on this issue. You watch the new ad by **clicking here.** **Parade in Peculiar:** Austin participated in his hometown of Peculiar’s parade! It was a lot of fun to see how many people knew Austin and were even wearing T-shirts and holding signs. The Liberty Express also made a big appearance! Special thanks to Papa Petersen for letting the campaign borrow his awesome car. He even drove it in the parade! **Austin talks cryptocurrencies:** Austin is getting a lot of media coverage for his support of cryptocurrencies. We’ve even received bitcoin donations over $100,000 but have been forced to return them due to campaign finance restrictions. You can check out some of Austin’s thoughts on cryptocurrencies [**here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.koinalert.com%2Fmissouri-senate-candidate-austin-petersen-talk-about-cryptocurrencies%2F&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062518_update&n=1) If you are interested in donating bitcoin, you can do so [**here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/bitcoin?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062518_update&n=2) **Immigration crisis:** The child separation crisis garnered a lot of attention last week. Fortunately, President Trump made an executive order to halt the policy and children will be returned to their families. Austin was asked what his thoughts were on the crisis by the Springfield News-Leader: "The U.S. has put a band-aid on the bullet wound of failed immigration policy for far too long. Separating families is a terrible policy that must change immediately," he said. "We desperately need immigration reform that removes the incentives for illegal immigration, keeps children safe from human trafficking, and prioritizes the swift prosecution of illegal aliens engaged in violent crime." That is the campaign update for the week! Thank you so much for your support, Friend. Please remember to check your inbox for Austin’s important email tomorrow. Heather Coil
Communications Director
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

---
Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
([www.austinpetersen.com](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062518_update&n=3))

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

[Privacy Policy](http://www.austinpetersen.com/privacy?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062518_update&n=4) | [Unsubscribe](http://www.austinpetersen.com/unsubscribe?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062518_update&n=5)

name: Amanda Brown Lierman
subject: This is another long email (but I think you'll enjoy it)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Last week, the DNC announced an additional $1.2 million in grants that will be distributed among 16 states.
---
Last week, the DNC announced an additional $1.2 million in grants that will be distributed among 16 states. These grants are part of the State Party Innovation Fund, which helps Democrats fight and win elections on the state and local level.

I've told you before that we're doing things differently at the DNC this year -- so I wanted to follow up to share a bit more about what that means.

This organization is now centered on a renewed commitment to empowering folks on the ground to organize and make a difference in their communities. Elections are fought and won at the local level. So the DNC is putting money where it matters most: in the states.

**I hope you'll keep reading and learn how this latest batch of grants to state parties will help Democrats win up and down the ballot.**
### WHAT IS THE STATE PARTY INNOVATION FUND?
It's a new program -- the first of its kind -- where competitive grants are awarded to state parties who put forth innovative ideas for engaging voters. These grants incentivize early organizing and support efforts to engage African American, Latino, Asian American and Pacific Islander, Native American, millennial, and rural communities.

So far, the DNC has supported proposals -- like Georgia's innovative vote-by-mail program targeting rural African American voters -- pairing traditional boots-on-the-ground organizing with next level digital mobilization tools. We've also supported programs like TN Rising, which prioritizes down-ballot campaigns in Tennessee and the Kansas Democratic Party's fellowship program, which trains and develops new leaders across the state.

### BASE ENGAGEMENT & ORGANIZING
We are investing in good old-fashioned organizing and innovative programmatic efforts by meeting people where they are, whether it's by phone, by text, or online, so Democrats can run the full-scale organizing it takes to win.

We just announced our latest investment of nearly $1.2 million, which will fund organizers in 16 different states to engage communities that make up the Democratic base. These organizers will start this summer -- right as state parties and campaigns are ramping up in the race to Election Day.

### VOTER REGISTRATION
At the outset, the State Party Innovation Fund put a special emphasis on engaging African American, Latino, rural, Asian American and Pacific Islander, Native American, and millennial voters. The program has also supported voter registration and mobilization efforts in Nevada, Arizona, Pennsylvania, and Florida.

### INVESTING IN SPECIAL ELECTIONS
We don't have to wait until November to elect Democrats -- there are elections happening every Tuesday until then. This year, the DNC has invested in federal and state special elections in Arizona, Alaska, Kentucky, Pennsylvania, Tennessee, New York, and Wisconsin.

One of those special elections -- in PA-18 -- led to Democrats flipping our first U.S. House seat of the cycle with Conor Lamb's stunning victory.

### MOVING FORWARD
The State Party Innovation Fund is the largest investment in competitive grants the Democratic Party has ever made -- and it's providing invaluable support, staff, and strategy to states.

Democrats need to flip 23 U.S. House seats and two U.S. Senate seats to take back control of Congress. There are also 36 gubernatorial races and more than 6,000 state legislative races on the ballot nationwide this year. Winning those races requires early investment, which is why the DNC distributed the first round of state party grants back in January.

Electing Democrats in all 50 states this year is going to take a lot of hard work, Derek. But as long as we organize, there's nothing we can't accomplish together.

**Thank you for your commitment to the Democratic Party. This year, we have a huge opportunity to help Democrats win up and down the ballot -- and I am confident that we will get it done.**

All my best,

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political & Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

[DONATE](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052122a/4067b0a/65ff14b38/7fbcfbeb/2444171237/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/state-party-investments?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20180625_abl_nd&source=em_20180625_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180625_abl_nd")

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052122a/4067b0a/65ff14b38/7fbcfbe8/2444171237/VEsE/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180625_abl_nd&source=em_20180625_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180625_abl_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052122a/4067b0a/65ff14b38/7fbcfbe9/2444171237/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180625_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180625_abl_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052122a/4067b0a/65ff14b38/7fbcfbf6/2444171237/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180625_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180625_abl_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052122a/4067b0a/65ff14b38/7fbcfbf7/2444171237/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180625_abl_nd&source=em_20180625_abl_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

So the DNC is putting money where it matters most: in the states. I hope you'll keep reading and learn how this latest batch of grants to state parties will help Democrats win up and down the ballot. WHAT IS THE STATE PARTY INNOVATION FUND? It's a new program -- the first of its kind -- where competitive grants are awarded to state parties who put forth innovative ideas for engaging voters. These grants incentivize early organizing and support efforts to engage African American, Latino, Asian American and Pacific Islander, Native American, millennial, and rural communities. So far, the DNC has supported proposals -- like Georgia's innovative vote-by-mail program targeting rural African American voters -- pairing traditional boots-on-the-ground organizing with next level digital mobilization tools. We've also supported programs like TN Rising, which prioritizes down-ballot campaigns in Tennessee and the Kansas Democratic Party's fellowship program, which trains and develops new leaders across the state. BASE ENGAGEMENT & ORGANIZING We are investing in good old-fashioned organizing and innovative programmatic efforts by meeting people where they are, whether it's by phone, by text, or online, so Democrats can run the full-scale organizing it takes to win. We just announced our latest investment of nearly $1.2 million, which will fund organizers in 16 different states to engage communities that make up the Democratic base. These organizers will start this summer -- right as state parties and campaigns are ramping up in the race to Election Day. VOTER REGISTRATION At the outset, the State Party Innovation Fund put a special emphasis on engaging African American, Latino, rural, Asian American and Pacific Islander, Native American, and millennial voters. The program has also supported voter registration and mobilization efforts in Nevada, Arizona, Pennsylvania, and Florida. INVESTING IN SPECIAL ELECTIONS We don't have to wait until November to elect Democrats -- there are elections happening every Tuesday until then. This year, the DNC has invested in federal and state special elections in Arizona, Alaska, Kentucky, Pennsylvania, Tennessee, New York, and Wisconsin. One of those special elections -- in PA-18 -- led to Democrats flipping our first U.S. House seat of the cycle with Conor Lamb's stunning victory. MOVING FORWARD The State Party Innovation Fund is the largest investment in competitive grants the Democratic Party has ever made -- and it's providing invaluable support, staff, and strategy to states. Democrats need to flip 23 U.S. House seats and two U.S. Senate seats to take back control of Congress. There are also 36 gubernatorial races and more than 6,000 state legislative races on the ballot nationwide this year. Winning those races requires early investment, which is why the DNC distributed the first round of state party grants back in January. Electing Democrats in all 50 states this year is going to take a lot of hard work, Derek. But as long as we organize, there's nothing we can't accomplish together. Thank you for your commitment to the Democratic Party. This year, we have a huge opportunity to help Democrats win up and down the ballot -- and I am confident that we will get it done. All my best, Amanda Amanda Brown Lierman Political & Organizing Director Democratic National Committee ""

name: Senator Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: For the first time in a long time, we have a real chance to win a Senate seat in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Friends,
When I was elected in 2016, Nevada had never sent a woman to the Senate, and no state -- nationwide -- had ever elected a Latina. So we knew this was going to be a tough fight. Leading up to Election Day, we saw polls that had me up, polls that had me down, and outside groups ultimately spent nearly _$50 million_ to try and tip the scales in our race.
At the end of the day, the outcome could have been anyone's guess. All my team and I knew was this: we had the power of a grassroots team like this on our side. If we stuck to our plan, worked hard, and fought to the very end, we would win. And that's exactly what we did.
**I'm watching Beto's race against Ted Cruz closely, and here's what I see: a fighter.** Someone who's working tirelessly to listen to the people of Texas and make sure everyone he hopes to represent in the Senate has a fair shot.
For the first time in a long time, we have a real chance to win a Senate seat in Texas. Recent polls show Beto and Cruz neck and neck. If Beto's going to win in November, we're all going to need to work hard and fight to the very end.
[**Beto counts on grassroots donations to power his campaign for Senate, and right now he's up against a steep end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Can you chip in $3 right now to make sure Beto has the resources he needs to take on Ted Cruz and win in November?**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92189/3b1d797/7976e2d9/35a98bf6/329090841/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180625-EOQ1&amount=3")
These last six months have made it clear as day: we NEED more leaders in the Senate who will stand up to this administration and listen to people, not corporate special interests.
Just imagine how different the fight to protect your health care or confirm unqualified Cabinet nominees -- like Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos -- would have been if Democrats had one more vote.
Electing leaders like Beto to the Senate is the only way we're going to stop extremists like Ted Cruz from rubber-stamping Donald Trump's hateful agenda.
And if you don't think winning in Texas is possible, let me remind you: in December, we powered Doug Jones to victory in Alabama, a state Donald Trump won by a whopping 28 points in 2016. **Trump only won Texas by nine.**
Special interests are going to pour millions into Texas -- just like they did in Nevada -- in an effort to tip the scales. The Koch brothers already announced attack ads against Beto. We need to help Beto fight back with real grassroots power.
[**Right now, Democrats need to flip just TWO Senate seats to take back the majority, which makes electing Beto in Texas critical. Will you give $3 right now to help Beto reach his critical end-of-quarter goal?**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92189/3b1d797/7976e2d9/35a98bf6/329090841/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180625-EOQ1&amount=3")
The power of grassroots supporters helped me and my campaign make history in 2016. And I know that if we work together to help Beto, we're going to make history this November.
_¡ La __lucha_ ___sigue_ _!_ The fight continues!
Senator Catherine Cortez Masto
**[Donate $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92189/3b1d797/7976e2d9/35a98bf6/329090841/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1806-eom?refcode=ema180625-EOQ1&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92189/3b1d797/7976e2d9/35a98bf7/329090841/VEsC/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") [ Click here to update your contact information.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92189/3b1d797/7976e2d9/35a98b88/329090841/VEsD/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92189/3b1d797/7976e2d9/35a98b89/329090841/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Dave Chappelle
subject: I'm not a political dude:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Why I'm doing this now.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a67d/7ab0e2c4/7fed0b6e/349b9a9a/2816809288/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-dave-chappelle?refcode=OHQ0616A") Friend, I'll be the first to admit, this is not my arena. I'm a politically aware dude, but I'm not a political dude. I've never actually campaigned for a candidate, but I've decided to for Ben -- not just because he's my friend, but because he's qualified and trustworthy. And, these days, being trustworthy is more important than ever. I believe in what Ben stands for and I believe in his vision for my home state, Maryland. [**Ben is the real deal and I hope you'll join me in supporting him by making a donation of $5 or more right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a67d/7ab0e2c4/7fed0b6e/349b9a9a/2816809288/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-dave-chappelle?refcode=OHQ0616A") Thanks, Dave Chappelle | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a67d/7ab0e2c4/7fed0b6e/349b9a9a/2816809288/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-dave-chappelle?refcode=OHQ0616A")

name: Tina Smith
subject: You, not Wall Street
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Real consequences.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b1f2/c1f7015/6bdff901/1142f68e/1617617246/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180625_em-A") Friend, I fight for you in the U.S. Senate -- not special interests or Wall Street. That's why I'm taking on Big Pharma to lower the cost of prescription drugs, working to raise the minimum wage, and voting to keep the big banks in line when they want to loosen regulations. I want to continue this fight alongside Elizabeth Warren and other progressive fighters in the U.S. Senate, but I can only do that if you step up now. **Republicans are telling dark money special interests that Minnesota is "vulnerable" and that a red wave is coming -- and there is no way we can compete with their money if you don't pitch in to close the $18,532 fundraising gap we face before our Saturday end-of-quarter deadline:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b1f2/c1f7015/6bdff901/1142f68f/1617617246/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180625_em-A&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ just called this a "race to watch." Donald Trump is promising to win this state. It's an election we cannot take for granted.
Because who represents you in the U.S. Senate has real consequences. You can't pay for a lobbyist, you have to count on your representative in Washington to listen and fight for you.
**You deserve a Senator who will fight for your healthcare, not allow a single cent to be cut from Medicare or Social Security, and never back down when Republicans or special interests attack working people.**
The stakes are so high, friends, and progressives everywhere must show how powerful we are.
**[Make a contribution of $10 or more to send a progressive fighter for you back to the U.S. Senate. We're just 5 days away from our deadline and we still have $18,532 to go. ](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b1f2/c1f7015/6bdff901/1142f685/1617617246/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIxMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq?refcode=rtw_20180625_em-A&amount=10")**
Thank you so much for everything you do,
Tina

name: Amy
subject: When President Trump came to Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Did you wake up last week to the news about President Trump's rally in Duluth? Did you hear about how he's targeting Minnesota?

**Well remember what I 've said all year:** We can't pull the blanket over our heads and hit the snooze button on this election year, we've got to get out there and win.

**Are we going to let the President have the last word in Duluth? No way.**

**Will you make a donation today to help me push back against President Trump 's campaign to target Minnesota?
** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JF5s%2FWUfC9jDRzHXcTHnflSoFodw%2Bw1H)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=rbPdzMrQjx9W9Eo97J0W0lSoFodw%2Bw1H)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=aDHIM%2FTuWoAdImKb82gQb1SoFodw%2Bw1H)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MUDWnTR4vvpm33Ssg3cryVSoFodw%2Bw1H)**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9GtII9q0qByORIbGT3N1z1SoFodw%2Bw1H)****

Right now it is more important than ever to hang on to our values, remember where we came from, and keep following the North Star.

Here in Minnesota that means hard work, getting things done, and investing in one another.

With your help we'll do it the Minnesota way -- by finding common ground and pushing through the bickering to get things done for people.

**[This is a critical time -- will you make a grassroots donation so we can share our positive message across our state?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Vyubn8Lzwp%2F5freE952ifFSoFodw%2Bw1H)**

Thanks,

Amy**

name: Sen. Elizabeth Warren
subject: Georgia's on my mind. Here's why it should be on yours, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀ |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa80/34a064cc/8ff1754/70f0cf6/2784189955/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=IE062518WARREN&source=IE062518WARREN")

| |
\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Dear Friend, I am asking you to chip in today to help make Stacey Abrams the next governor of Georgia. Here's why: Like me, Stacey didn't grow up wealthy or well-connected. She's the daughter of a librarian and a shipyard worker, and she knows what it means to have to work hard to get ahead. Maybe that's why Stacey has never shied away from a tough fight. When she served as the top Democrat in the Georgia House, she fought to level the playing field for women, students, seniors, veterans, and working people. **I know that as governor, Stacey Abrams will build a Georgia where more families like yours can get ahead. Please, stand with me to help Stacey Abrams fight for working families:** ********[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa80/34a064cc/8ff1754/70f0cf4/2784189955/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-donate-to-stacey?refcode=IE062518WARREN_TOP&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in++ask+nbsp+nbsp+raquo&utm_campaign=IE062518WARREN&source=IE062518WARREN")******** Friend, I was already a grandmother when I decided to run for the U.S. Senate for the first time. I had never run for anything before, but I knew I had to step up and fight on behalf of the issues that I cared about and working families like the one I grew up in. **Stacey Abrams shares that commitment for Georgia, and she's got a real shot at winning this thing.** But she can't do it alone. It's going to take strong grassroots support to stand up to Georgia's powerful Republican establishment and defeat the powerful interests that are sure to line up against us. **Will you chip in for the first time since Stacey's primary win and be a part of this fight? Team Abrams will win if supporters like you are all in, right now.** **[https://secure.staceyabrams.com/Join-The-Fight](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaa80/34a064cc/8ff1754/70f0cf2/2784189955/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-donate-to-stacey?refcode=IE062518WARREN_FIRST&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=5+-+httpssecurestaceyabramscomJoinTheFight&utm_campaign=IE062518WARREN&source=IE062518WARREN")** I'm all in for Stacey Abrams because she fights from the heart. She has the ability to bring feuding parties to the table to get good done, but she's not afraid to stand firm in her values. And you can bet that Governor Abrams will always put you and your family first. Team Abrams relies on grassroots supporters like you to fund the hard work it'll take to win in November - knocking on doors, reaching out to voters, and spreading Stacey's message to every corner of the state. When we all work together for progress, everyone wins. Thanks for fighting with us, Sen. Elizabeth Warren

---

clean_body: ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀ ⠀⠀⠀ | "" | | \----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Dear Friend, I am asking you to chip in today to help make Stacey Abrams the next governor of Georgia. Here's why: Like me, Stacey didn't grow up wealthy or well-connected. She's the daughter of a librarian and a shipyard worker, and she knows what it means to have to work hard to get ahead. Maybe that's why Stacey has never shied away from a tough fight. When she served as the top Democrat in the Georgia House, she fought to level the playing field for women, students, seniors, veterans, and working people. I know that as governor, Stacey Abrams will build a Georgia where more families like yours can get ahead. Please, stand with me to help Stacey Abrams fight for working families: ****** ""**** Friend, I was already a grandmother when I decided to run for the U.S. Senate for the first time. I had never run for anything before, but I knew I had to step up and fight on behalf of the issues that I cared about and working families like the one I grew up in. Stacey Abrams shares that commitment for Georgia, and she's got a real shot at winning this thing. But she can't do it alone. It's going to take strong grassroots support to stand up to Georgia's powerful Republican establishment and defeat the powerful interests that are sure to line up against us. Will you chip in for the first time since Stacey's primary win and be a part of this fight? Team Abrams will win if supporters like you are all in, right now. ""** I'm all in for Stacey Abrams because she fights from the heart. She has the ability to bring feuding parties to the table to get good done, but she's not afraid to stand firm in her values. And you can bet that Governor Abrams will always put you and your family first. Team Abrams relies on grassroots supporters like you to fund the hard work it'll take to win in November - knocking on doors, reaching out to voters, and spreading Stacey's message to every corner of the state. When we all work together for progress, everyone wins. Thanks for fighting with us, Sen. Elizabeth Warren "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-447 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2017 Stacey Abrams for Governor, All rights reserved "" | | Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor

subject: no such thing as "safe"
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|

| | Debbie has five opponents. Trump has continually attacked her. A Koch-backed group has run ads against her. And all of her opponents continue to raise real cash. | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f39/622b7b5b/1b9b0f4e/307b9f12/3042875560/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180621e?refcode=dwse180621e_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
When it comes to elections, especially in these crazy political times, there's no such thing as "safe." Just look at who's sitting in the Oval Office.
**If we want to protect all the things we care about -- the Affordable Care Act, Planned Parenthood, Medicare, Social Security, to name a few -- we need to act.** We need to support Debbie, in this race and in all of her efforts.
And to do that, we NEED to hit our $30,000 FEC goal before the deadline on Saturday.
[**The only thing we can safely say right now is that we need you to rush in a contribution to get us to this goal. Please, if you can, give $5 or more.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f39/622b7b5b/1b9b0f4e/307b9f12/3042875560/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180621e?refcode=dwse180621e_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
Thanks!
Team DWS

body:

---
| | | Friends, With the busy schedule of events and parades Team Banks has been attending this summer, we want to make sure you stay up to date on everything we've been up to!

This weekend, our team marched in the Huntington Heritage Days Parade, the Pennville Fair Parade, the Woodburn Summerfest Parade, and the Avilla Freedom Days Parade. We were also represented at the Greek Fest in Fort Wayne! As always, Team Banks is grateful for the outpouring of grassroots support we continue to receive from our dedicated volunteers and all the hardworking Hoosiers we've met on the campaign trail.

If you haven't already, we would love for you to join our team today! \- Team Banks

name: Tim Kaine for Virginia
subject: Derek, share your thoughts on Betsy DeVos and the Department of Education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ba/3e0906/68a00cd2/3e34478f/2170515802/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180625_1_SURV_TEAM_DeVos-SURV&source=20180625_1_SURV_TEAM_DeVos-SURV")

| | Derek,

Since Betsy DeVos was narrowly confirmed to lead the Department of Education, she has crossed many things off of her to-do list.

Here are some of the highlights:
* Cut back investigations into abuses by for-profit colleges
* Rescinded Obama-era Title IX protections
* Curtailed Education Department civil rights cases
* Picked the CEO of a private student loan company to lead Office of Federal Student Aid

Make no mistake, the effects of these policies are already being felt. But there are even more bad ideas where these came from - and our children, teachers, and communities cannot afford any more shortcuts.

Now, she wants to gut public education funding in favor of "school choice" \- funneling much needed taxpayer money away from our public schools.

Tim Kaine has worked to fight against her most egregious offenses, but she has still pushed through far too many pieces of her radical agenda.

[We want to hear from you. Will you share your thoughts in a quick survey on education? Click here to participate >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ba/3e0906/68a00cd2/3e34478e/2170515802/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/DeVos-Survey?source=20180625_1_SURV_TEAM_DeVos-SURV&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+We+want+to+hear+from+you+Will+you+share+&utm_campaign=20180625_1_SURV_TEAM_DeVos-SURV")

Thank you so much for sharing your thoughts!

Team Kaine | [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13ba/3e0906/68a00cd2/3e34478d/2170515802/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/DeVos-Survey?source=20180625_1_SURV_TEAM_DeVos-SURV&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=20180625_1_SURV_TEAM_DeVos-SURV")

body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoo5FRPe20rXb_Nj44w1aC17ezys0tuDdXjL97ohiyY=/Vr0vbILwII9o-1f_R1lsAUS8ZF18Lei7KqNPMmUxEJQ=)

MO Fraternal Order of Police Endorses Mark! [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoo5FRPe20rXb_Nj44w1aC17ezys0tuDdXjL97ohiyY=/7cIoW0-e32UiDlhnW600ryMPNvGPtdRn47b6z0RgIyE=) We are honored to receive the endorsement of the Missouri Fraternal Order of Police!

The Missouri Fraternal Order of Police is the statewide organization of police with over 7,000 members. Its membership is comprised primarily of full-time rank-and-file law enforcement officers employed in Missouri. As a union, the FOP represents working men and women who serve the public and keep our communities safe. Mark is a former member of UFCW Local 655 and a strong advocate for unions. We need to foster partnerships built on trust and understanding between officers and the communities they serve. Through open and honest conversation and practices between first responders, public servants, and communities, we can strengthen ties between police and our district as we keep our focus on public service. [**Join us to support a candidate who can win in November and who will represent everyone in our district:**](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoo5FRPe20rXb_Nj44w1aC17ezys0tuDdXjL97ohiyY=/Zs0t8Kt-s6GWmzyse_Y9w6KYVQLD5dHVwyiQVt4c7QY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoo5FRPe20rXb_Nj44w1aC17ezys0tuDdXjL97ohiyY=/Zs0t8Kt-s6GWmzyse_Y9w6KYVQLD5dHVwyiQVt4c7QY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoo5FRPe20rXb_Nj44w1aC17ezys0tuDdXjL97ohiyY=/KCGtMLNw_-MV-wdLEESmaQaqOItwjGQ8Oh6yuibYbgU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/aoo5FRPe20rXb_Nj44w1aC17ezys0tuDdXjL97ohiyY=/JEF4xC0_Lavpp_r4xpL4xA9KC3xYXwEFFyUREZRiCWQ=)

In solidarity,

Mark Osmack
Democrat for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20Sykes?=
subject: The Truth About Children at the Border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
The Dems are DEAD WRONG | |
---
| | | **Peter,**

Democrats are telling us daily that Department of Homeland Security is "separating children at the border from their 'families'"

**This narrative is a dangerous and heartbreaking lie.**

Northern Mexico is the most volatile region in the world: more than 25,000 deaths due to armed conflict each year.

Compared to Afghanistan, with 16,000 deaths, the United States would be safer today if we bordered Afghanistan than it is right now bordering Mexico.

**The largest enterprise in northern Mexico is criminal activity, illicit drug trading, sex trafficking, and arms trafficking. **

**The reality?:**

**Street children out of Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, and Mexico, are being used as mules for the drug trade or as prostitutes in sex trafficking.**

These children are being used by monstrous gangs as shields to create a pathway for drug smuggling, sex trafficking, and arms dealings to cross illegally into the United States.

By having an open border, and sanctuary cities, to help children "stay with their families" we only encourage more cartels, gangs, and prostiution rings to TAKE AND USE CHILDREN as a pathway into the United States to carry out more evil.

To make matters worse, we have a blatantly ignorant portion of the public who are buying into the Democrats' narrative that these children are seeking safety in the United States with their families.

THIS LIBERAL NARRATIVE MUST BE STOPPED. DHS are PROTECTING THESE CHILDREN.

By claiming that DHS is committing "child abuse" for protecting these children at the border, Democrats are going to cause more children will go missing off the streets of Central America in the hands of drug cartels and child sex traffickers.

With the likes of George Clooney and Nancy Pelosi and Rachel Maddow wailing each day about the "cruelty" of "separating" children from their "families," the United States is signaling to the underworld that we welcome any illegal immigrant so long as they have a crying child in tow.

**The depths of this evil is beyond abhorrent. The ignorance of the left allowing this to happen is perhaps a greater evil.**

This is heartbreaking.

DHS only separates children from the custodian if:
* Custodian cannot prove relationship to child
* Child is at risk
* Custodian is engaged in criminal activity

When families come across the border from Honduras, Guatemala, El Salvador, etc. with documentation from their country and seek asylum, DHS does NOT separate these families.

The only reason DHS separates children from the custodian is to protect the child.

While Democrats stand around and call our DHS agents "Nazis" I understand the dangers of the DHS's job in protecting the Untied States and protecting children who are being used to cross our southern border.

I know that our DHS agents will lay down their lives to protect these children and to protect American citizens.

Liberal Democrats only want to make the situation worse.

I have been on the ground on our southern border and Central America, I know firsthand the pernicious evils pouring into our wide open southern border.

We need more senators who understand these issues from the ground up. I do. That is why I am running.

[I need your help. Stand with me on this. I am fighting for all of us.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=bb1e3d9af6&e=9da9b0ca31)

[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=5e14a6e7b8&e=9da9b0ca31)
Courtland Sykes

clean_body: The Dems are DEAD WRONG | | | | | Peter, Democrats are telling us daily that Department of Homeland Security is "separating children at the border from their 'families'" This narrative is a dangerous and heartbreaking lie. Northern Mexico is the most volatile region in the world: more than 25,000 deaths due to armed conflict each year. Compared to Afghanistan, with 16,000 deaths, the United States would be safer today if we bordered Afghanistan than it is right now bordering Mexico. The largest enterprise in northern Mexico is criminal activity, illicit drug trading, sex trafficking, and arms trafficking. The reality?: Street children out of Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, and Mexico, are being used as mules for the drug trade or as prostitutes in sex trafficking. These children are being used by monstrous gangs as shields to create a pathway for drug smuggling, sex trafficking, and arms dealings to cross illegally into the United States. By having an open border, and sanctuary cities, to help children "stay with their families" we only encourage more cartels, gangs, and prostiution rings to TAKE AND USE CHILDREN as a pathway into the United States to carry out more evil. To make matters worse, we have a blatantly ignorant portion of the public who are buying into the Democrats' narrative that these children are seeking safety in the United States with their families. THIS LIBERAL NARRATIVE MUST BE STOPPED. DHS are PROTECTING THESE CHILDREN. By claiming that DHS is committing "child abuse" for protecting these children at the border, Democrats are going to cause more children will go missing off the streets of Central America in the hands of drug cartels and child sex traffickers. With the likes of George Clooney and Nancy Pelosi and Rachel Maddow wailing each day about the "cruelty" of "separating" children from their "families," the United States is signaling to the underworld that we welcome any illegal immigrant so long as they have a crying child in tow. The depths of this evil is beyond abhorrent. The ignorance of the left allowing this to happen is perhaps a greater evil. This is heartbreaking. DHS only separates children from the custodian if: Custodian cannot prove relationship to child Child is at risk Custodian is engaged in criminal activity When families come across the border from Honduras, Guatemala, El Salvador, etc. with documentation from their country and seek asylum, DHS does NOT separate these families. The only reason DHS separates children from the custodian is to protect the child. While Democrats stand around and call our DHS agents "Nazis" I understand the dangers of the DHS's job in protecting the Untied States and protecting children who are being used to cross our southern border. I know that our DHS agents will lay down their lives to protect these children and to protect American citizens. Liberal Democrats only want to make the situation worse. I have been on the ground on our southern border and Central America, I know firsthand the pernicious evils pouring into our wide open southern border. We need more senators who understand these issues from the ground up. I do. That is why I am running. Courtland Sykes | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | Sykes is America's boldest, most outspoken candidate on issues you care most about: God and Family First Pro-Strong Military Pro-Wall Pro-Gun Pro-Law Enforcement Pro-Lower Taxes Pro-Energy Pro-School Choice Oppose-Radical Feminist Agenda Oppose-Globalism Oppose-Green Lunacy #1 Constitutional Conservative America Number One MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE Courtland Sykes for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: giving it all we've got
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
| | | **I 'll be up front: I need your help right now.**

We're facing the most important deadline of this campaign in just five days.

The numbers we report in our FEC filing directly reflect our strength, and we need to show a lot of power to prove we can go toe-to-toe with our opponents and their powerful backers.

**_[That's why the team and I have set an ambitious fundraising goal: $50,000 in the door before midnight on Saturday. Can you donate right now to help us get there? >>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+the+team+and+I+have+set+a&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180625_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180625_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180625_1_1")_**

With all the chaos coming out of Washington, now more than ever Arizonans need an independent voice fighting for them in the Senate.

Whether it's protecting health care for people with pre-existing conditions, fighting harmful cuts to Medicare, or opposing the "gag rule" that would jeopardize access to essential care for millions of women, the stakes are high in this election. We need leaders who will stand up for our shared values.

**And really, that 's why I'm running: To do what's right for our state and our country and be a strong voice for everyday people.**

Getting to the Senate won't be easy. I need your help today to make sure we report the strongest possible numbers in our end-of-quarter FEC report.

**_[Can you send a contribution now to help me fight for our shared values and counter the misleading attacks my opponents have already started running against me?>>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+send+a+contribution+now+to+help+&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_WL_180625_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_WL_180625_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_WL_180625_1_1")_**

Thanks for all you do,

Kyrsten

|
---|---|---

|
---

name: Team Scholten
subject: What's it all for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
While you probably get a lot of emails asking for money, here’s one that’s a little different. We want to tell you what we’re doing with the campaign funds that we raise.
In the primary, we had ads running on TV and in newspapers, we sent out texts to the cell phones of Democratic voters, and we did a robocall to voters with landlines. We also sent out mailers, ran ads online, and planted yard signs in all 39 counties across the district. And, of course, we bought the greatest campaign vehicle in the history of Iowa, a 29-foot RV dubbed “Sioux City Sue.” **In short, we’re leaving no stones—and no potential voters—unturned in our quest to defeat Steve King.**
In the general election, we plan on doing more of the same. We will soon be launching a field program, the likes of which has never before been seen in the 4th District. We’re going to be needing volunteers to knock on doors, make phone calls, and hand out literature to as many voters as humanly possible—a task that is much more challenging in a district as large as this one. And to do all of that, we’ll be needing funds for gas, literature, phones, food, ad buys, etc. _That’s where you come in._ The incredible grassroots movement we’re building is powerful and getting stronger by the day. We’ve even received contributions from all 50 states in each of the last two quarters! **Your ongoing and appreciated support is the best tool we have in our quest to dethrone Steve King. **
[**_So, say you’re all in with J.D. with a contribution of whatever you can comfortably do today by clicking HERE._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1492812/8064713/14924280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTFmNzJhOC1jMzc4LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LW71os35KZM7K2vhsjXzoedwmpWZG8MTPoS_Gsw2hCg=) And thank you so much for your continued backing of this movement for change.
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten
**P.S. We’re not even halfway there to meeting our end-of-quarter goal with just five days to go.[ Any help you can provide in helping us meet this critical goal would be most appreciated!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1492813/8064714/721875404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTFmNzJhOC1jMzc4LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LW71os35KZM7K2vhsjXzoedwmpWZG8MTPoS_Gsw2hCg=)**

name: Mary Barzee Flores (personal)
subject: please read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress |
body:
Friends,

Last week really demonstrated just what we’re up against if we want to see change in our country. Our immigration system is in desperate need of common-sense and compassionate reform, in Miami-Dade County and at the federal level.

In fact, The Tampa Bay Times called Congressional Republicans “losers of the week” for their failure to pass any sort of comprehensive immigration reform, including codifying DACA.

And that’s just one of the complicated, pressing matters we’re up against. I’m ready to use my experience as a judge to be a part of the solution. A solution that we need so badly.

However, I need your help to get there. If you’re ready for change, please help me flip FL25 in November by chipping in what you can here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1806-q2-mbf?refcode=180625-email-pm&recurring=true

Everything is on the line this election. It will certainly be one of the most, if not the most, important elections of modern times.

Have you done your part?

Thank you,
Mary

Sent via iPhone

-----------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress |
-----------------------------------------------------

Mary Barzee Flores for Congress c/o – Gloria Maggiolo
6619 S Dixie Hwy, #148
Miami FL 33143 United States

In fact, The Tampa Bay Times called Congressional Republicans “losers of the week” for their failure to pass any sort of comprehensive immigration reform, including codifying DACA. And that’s just one of the complicated, pressing matters we’re up against. I’m ready to use my experience as a judge to be a part of the solution. A solution that we need so badly. However, I need your help to get there. If you’re ready for change, please help me flip FL25 in November by chipping in what you can here: Everything is on the line this election. It will certainly be one of the most, if not the most, important elections of modern times. Have you done your part? Thank you, Mary Sent via iPhone | Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress | Mary Barzee Flores for Congress c/o – Gloria Maggiolo 6619 S Dixie Hwy, #148 Miami FL 33143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Tom Wolf
subject: I'm standing with Planned Parenthood. Are you too?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hello,

I emailed you before about the Trump administration's attack on Title X funding, but now they are taking their fight to the next level.

For more than 40 years, Title X has provided critical federal funds for women's healthcare. But the Trump administration is trying to restrict the information clinics that receive Title X funding can share with women -- putting those clinics at risk.

If Planned Parenthood clinics and others put women first and refuse to follow the guidelines, they'll risk losing the funding they need to care for women.

I've joined with Democratic governors to build national pressure to stop the Trump administration's radical attacks on Planned Parenthood, doctors, and women's health, and I'm hoping you'll join us.

[**Sign our joint petition now, and tell President Trump to put women's health ahead of politics and stop the Title X gag rule.**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2fe/73a2bc12/3b7844cd/1fcdc34c/1568793273/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Wolf")

I know that people in Cresco care about protecting these critical, life-saving funds. So I'm hoping that with your support, we can build the pressure needed to stop the Trump administration's attacks.

**[Stand with women and add your name now: Tell President Trump to stop the Title X gag rule.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2fe/73a2bc12/3b7844cd/1fcdc34c/1568793273/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Wolf")**

Thanks for standing with us,

Tom
| [**Add your name ->**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2fe/73a2bc12/3b7844cd/1fcdc34c/1568793273/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Wolf")
---

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Tom Wolf (info@wolfforpa.com)
Date: Sun, Jun 10, 2018
Subject: Stop them from defunding Planned Parenthood

Hello --

All women deserve access to comprehensive health care and the best medical advice available from their doctors -- without needing a permission slip from Donald Trump and Mike Pence.

But the Trump administration has proposed a new policy that would cut off access to care for millions of women and would demand that doctors and clinics that receive federal funding through Title X withhold information about health care options. And if clinics like Planned Parenthood choose to put their patients first and refuse to follow the new guidance, they could be defunded.

This misguided policy is a backdoor plan to defund Planned Parenthood and will put the health of women in jeopardy. That's why I'll do everything in my power to stop it.

I recently joined 13 governors across the country in asking Alex Azar, Secretary of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, to reject this new policy that will harm women. Now I'm asking you to join me in taking action.

**[Tell Trump: Don't defund Planned Parenthood. Stop the Title X gag rule!->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2fe/73a2bc12/3b7844cd/1fcdc34c/1568793273/VEsC/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Wolf")**
[**Add your name ->**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2fe/73a2bc12/3b7844cd/1fcdc34c/1568793273/VEsD/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Wolf")
---
As Pennsylvania's governor, I've stood with women and with Planned Parenthood and even served as a Planned Parenthood clinic escort before I was elected because I believe we must protect women's rights to make their own medical decisions.

But President Trump, on the other hand, is playing politics with women's health.

I'm ready to fight Donald Trump and his backward agenda with everything I have. But I need you with me.

**Join me in sending a message: We cannot defund Planned Parenthood. Sign the petition now:**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Stop-The-Title-X-Gag-Rule](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2fe/73a2bc12/3b7844cd/1fcdc34c/1568793273/VEsA/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stopthegagrule/?code=Wolf")**

Thanks for standing with me,

Tom

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

[Click here](mailto:info@wolfforpa.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact the campaign with any questions, concerns, or ideas. [Click here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec2fe/73a2bc12/3b7844cd/1fcdc372/1568793273/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") if you would like to unsubscribe from Tom Wolf for Governor email updates.

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Sign my petition: It is time to dissolve ICE, end family detention centers and guarantee legal representation for children in immigration proceedings. This is our moral and legal obligation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
ICE undermines what we aspire to be as Americans. It is an unaccountable and inhumane political tool, treating all immigrants as national security threats.
#
Peter -
In the past few weeks, it has become increasingly clear that the Trump administration is committing human rights abuses with its treatment of immigrant families. This is a legal and moral emergency.
ICE undermines what we aspire to be as Americans. It is an unaccountable and inhumane political tool, treating all immigrants as national security threats. The solution is clear:
**We must abolish ICE.**
**[Sign my petition: It is time to dissolve ICE, end family detention centers and guarantee legal representation for children in immigration proceedings. This is our moral and legal obligation.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e65/6e822e2f/1b2622c2/4172634a/2155121131/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MjUtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/abolish-ice?source=em180625-full")**
ICE and Customs and Border Patrol (CBP) have become so rife with substantiated abuse incidents that we can no longer treat these incidents like a few bad apples. ICE is so politicized that it's not credible as a law enforcement agency, and so deeply riddled with illegal behavior that they are no longer credible as a self-governing agency. Instead, they have become tools of arbitrary power and cruelty.
But the problems with these agencies go far deeper than this ongoing atrocity. ICE is stunningly unaccountable, by design.
Let's be clear: ICE is a fairly recent development. When the George W. Bush administration successfully pushed to place immigration enforcement within the Department of Homeland Security (DHS), it transformed decades of past practice where internal immigration policy was conducted by the justice department. The new policy sent a clear and chilling signal: immigrants should be treated as criminals and a national security threat.
So it is not an accident that Donald Trump can use ICE and CBP as tools of unconstitutional illegal behavior. The agencies were purposefully created that way.
We cannot rest until every family is reunited and until the policy of indefinite detention is totally abandoned. And as attorney general, I will use my powers to block the federal government's illegal programs, to use the full reach of New York law to get information from the administration about the family separation program, and to protect the rights of separated children and parents.
But we need to go beyond the current moment and deal with the structural threat. Power corrupts; absolute power corrupts absolutely. The illegality of these agencies is by design, and the only answer is to abolish ICE.
**If you agree, sign my petition and add your voice to the growing call to abolish ICE:**
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/abolish-ICE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e65/6e822e2f/1b2622c2/4172634a/2155121131/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MjUtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/abolish-ice?source=em180625-full")**
Thank you,
Zephyr
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e65/6e822e2f/1b2622c2/4172634a/2155121131/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MjUtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/abolish-ice?source=em180625-full")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---

Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e65/6e822e2f/1b2622c2/4172634b/2155121131/VEsC/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e65/6e822e2f/1b2622c2/4172634c/2155121131/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

**President Trump just came to Nevada and attacked Jacky directly, so this is a critical moment.** With the future of the Senate riding on who wins this race, I can't tell you how important it is that we get your voice in the mix. We want to hear about what issues matter most to you and those close to you. **Please, spare a moment to answer just a few questions? Thanks so much.
Danny
