name: Travis Tazelaar
subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Don't sleep on this.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a672/7ab0e2c4/7fec590b/349b9bde/622027107/VEsH/ "https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/PollingPlaceSearch") Friend, Tomorrow is the day we've been working toward for over a year. (390 days, to be exact, but who's counting?) Tomorrow is Election Day here in Maryland for the gubernatorial primaries -- this race has been neck-and-neck for months, and I can promise you: Every. Single. Vote. Matters. **So I'll make this quick:** [**Make a plan to vote tomorrow, then find your nearest polling place -- and get out and vote!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a672/7ab0e2c4/7fec590b/349b9bde/622027107/VEsE/ "https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/PollingPlaceSearch") Thanks, Travis Travis Tazelaar
Campaign Manager
Ben Jealous for Governor P.S. Tomorrow night we're having an election night party! [**Doors open at 7:00 p.m. at the Reginald F. Lewis Museum of Maryland African-American History & Culture at 830 East Pratt Street in Baltimore -- RSVP now to join the party!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a672/7ab0e2c4/7fec590b/349b9bd9/622027107/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/events/417872145283073/") Everyone is welcome. Hope to see you there! | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a672/7ab0e2c4/7fec590b/349b9bd8/622027107/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ06258B")
---

* * *

name: Speaker Paul Ryan
subject: I Choose Leah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Leah Vukmir has been a principal driver of these reforms that improve things for families all across our state. She is motivated, experienced, and a..

Friend,

During my years representing Wisconsinites, I have seen our state take positive steps forward. What was once a blue state has become a beacon for conservative values, strong families, limited government, and lower taxes.

Leah Vukmir has been a principal driver of these reforms that improve things for families all across our state. She is motivated, experienced, and a determined leader. Guided by her dedication to her family and to Wisconsin, she has a proven track record that we can count on. **That’s why Congressman Jim Sensenbrenner and I are proud to endorse Leah for U.S. Senate.**
**[JOIN SPEAKER RYAN, ENDORSE LEAH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbC4QfekbMDI4QDgBFjRNfEKwMFALlGK6pBXACeoirzRbXdnuUa8_8zbZMo_bO786CAj9AepuUGuusfes4cFDm7CarInFA-ln8abx8EXRHpfJg0gZwPJ2w2Jfj9cEBimiDMdbdai6HljBfCP_3iTyzVVI-zH782EtukdFoDmunGDt00NhQpzHijJek8WJPRkj93G4KojlQhmV9C4rOzliHHuZkgLAthi1rYtLY59SHSzWSdY4jhxNHwd9lWr43Ev9SICW6PYi6-_IjJwQOW9SXqUb3Xflamc-oGLecrXe34mqg-hUtelSSyo2hmIJSySP2bT2YshJwWE8Ufg_TwGLuywLiTobTH33m4SU1Oc4NIxlDEfmFOoqO7E4zf7EcrQJ8G7akyT4-tv5UbhXJdf58ks%3D)**
---
** **

In the State Senate, Leah has been instrumental in cutting taxes, turning a deficit into a surplus with the passage of Act 10, and banning late-term abortions. But knowing Leah, she’s only just getting started. With Leah in the Senate, we’ll be able to put patients back in control of their health care decisions, take more Americans from welfare to work, and continue to defend our precious unborn. We need Leah in the Senate, and that’s why we’re going to stand with her every step of the way.
** ******
[**Donate now to support Leah**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbC4QfekbMDI4QDgBFjRNfEKwMFALlGK6pBXACeoirzRbXdnuUa8_8zbZMo_bO786CAj9AepuUGuusfes4cFDm7CarInFA-ln8abx8EXRHpfJg0gZwPJ2w2Jfj9cEBimiDMdbdai6HljBfCP_3iTyzVVI-zH782EtukdFoDmunGDtWCUKu4G8WM4BN8UBF9BUbJA0_TwTCjvw8UY9c0FyPDP5fEbuPTceK4wJhqBPKQjDKhlO6N9OZ3cNOnzTveFg_OCrNu3mb0juW8Vj8YmMIzuWb4hiCcA2CSlJweTMRgxXSUJR5h9jg0oRN_Z7ecxgpNByXrxH-RB8S710_8YsGPv1jIXyXzQVYAAWl6XyO9iZEyZzAaFcaXMh0VNWkiuRhw5LPiIkTXayq94kMInoYns%3D)

We’re hoping conservative activists from all across the state will join us as we unite behind her because we know she is the best candidate to take on Senator Baldwin this fall.** **
**[PLEASE RSVP HERE](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbAgD9cjyrtVqY88FlayKP9TgaTVl1wfYR5lixpCMi2pQpviLUAy2_Li6I9BGH7KbrAuPDugc7RWcbGowUuz-bgHH1sNItAtrxg4FJJmjwzvsdmFOrJ0WhfD-Nj193L3iBsQrjOC32HNm5EGykpLSzq_PC5Mn707ez9UPD5KmTyd38OjijxGde7ICZ0PoC02yBJT-pxzB2kJxeUoSNCuRdvqCJpQ-lPfx7zkIlhbFwQsdaUKq7SqS2Gvu_P5N4shM9q4CPpmeErXlUcd7pdyB6eX6C-guajeLXowVz6xl3bHCZOAR1tRGeNZuhhuJk6tmAmNLIt-RLeaBzStSUwRSAZazsZH_bzPMC6J3LbzsyK0k) **

** **
**[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbNyxmq54zpH9aRexJjOT-qrl6-tHPuliwrjKEY7EBrbYV65clWfB5qPYeZd5bkk4ohB5BNKNlb9VWHztdF749XVWNLun4e4HiCxl6XHSeidz__-Z8BNzG4dSecA7Xx-Lqnd58Gj3v8qi9Ccqs9noXNcAVyya9ru8k9rxNwvoikCuF4_CQFKi-OTeSFv5XYMdKGqnbsdnAtGxwpJgpO_irWiABo1wXnL_DcJaHkFdYMeq-aysYH4Au-GsLzRl3pa0Zg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbBQnE6kTXtOGnmQZPacFxZWqv5YrfbzII_m4oNqISFY7flYFAE-aSccfDedc8x0Ue3XOUP77gd44h4mcMrCeVel4IGMQiFOa-LXIa3YHn5easfORR4IjDNqiLsULXHxsl3XDP128m_sMMMtJA1kZnyYOaNg4tPUeZQk1r9YWcPsEdmrHTt37kFo_PrIIyY6NH7REuDDNg8tuGHsqKQFQBrnIpWNpJj562ascWBCVirbP_SKWv_attmWFYLJBnOnfnQ%3D%3D) **
Paid for by Leah for Senate
---

** **
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=Wc_x514zRqeXGcgM66GIXLrfpGVro2RpWb3ggcnOZmsw-OK30PXa6fbEwSGgOeZyEgV7XPIL6iTx5sow0NtDPddvPKYz6LFCFJKVim5yQ4ICdyqhDO01e7xpSFxLiijZPAcs96d3Ue0y82_yjrGToApuNEgY3aN89j71CxFK5RRqdgceGQQUIwqAdP6gxf0hhu6G9Bb4oemGIsg48J5mHgA8ndoHh8vxlJDJtHfxjPvGv8dNTxH22h_Ckx-mXlYG). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbLvJQa3cB8_XKSdZE3v1_3UaNSK_b_K74907cR6ZcUSqLEoTPNRqfoaKjFX_pFH-8dJB6Vex_ImL4DB3WHA3Q4RjyonouOoo3I-qCtbn2eWebfmJ91gZAsfuBwmyG555pHWZiRYzfV2Jc0Eh_KuaTDjcmDFWYgsQR2mbYOSTQFCvchAKedyGbqNFXfZw5QMX_Q5sE0DyODfeInldVSdxF3U5VZplBlMDNzlE-8VjqBZTG9LTztvU9Yr7Xfky5PgIQl6xSEaBKCtzjb0x4jRzYXyHZy_nFpRvs-MjtRbjeMqLPY2UGIeGQ8JL7QIaBVbM-I0nLYU0jZXmk_InSR_gBJNu_wlzWuHUM192438UAkdE) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbLvJQa3cB8_XKSdZE3v1_3UiAVUS0cpCuwRHliIUqdaJB6E3IaJCvmjEnqV-ZSYKeJJI4Otr3tBwtElTeGYNOpKOh6PZXwAdesS5mYlgm8_gKsfKSTZWbVhfiwB27jwH9PPBTlcllTX6qfkrm8Rn2WBgV5a6oPZwfur7BW1nB0pJhqkKGqRHO-oE132LPhOQ7lDBtZJ1GyN75G4QUcrfSpKcWrXaPXuia5NsHnz93csDv9nyqZufFNdgSnyGyZCY8WDYNScyDSPi6EaH6dPJ8AJr7CXWRgnJQbSxIFtgJjKK4c6AH_l2-GXLeXJ1xyFdhlauRSwxDsqmmMFp5DEunkwkOxTA4qbS5e9cPSwUolYU) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbNyxmq54zpH9aRexJjOT-qrl6-tHPuliwrjKEY7EBrbYFC7mBZsQGEPqqyjtaV81Z4-tyLddKGBLb-7PBhheRlOfDmROt-6gudcTJmFTg08r79vv6aFSWCRWCQQflCWkOapXkJQipELcxa7hG4GWDkF-8PDvAP-MPtjSz-O97AfncD1Ukc3A9t8GZ3AefXPAhiymf9l7pjKpnLOp3f1qCy6Gdy55eRJfnFE9SfsVge6iRhDABfRDnSNivVxdrLSr4A%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbBQnE6kTXtOGnmQZPacFxZWqv5YrfbzII_m4oNqISFY7LGLhjT_GTbQIRWl2H8_QBjLL_OiYQKyvvifk6nSiZwZeG6yXejHvRLnj5XBwMrnW94FJ9sMoYmyOauWtSv_dwS_X2UKMeyC2Q344ZubKuL9PjXIHiaxiEhDUVaTuYdavjXGVxDOZ7XW3cjWEEfUMCLj1S3QRG-_DmOumbAxYICclZtBkZ4pdlcvX75vnSY--l-rCmmbM8NDRSrxh9gcUzw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbFanbNYAf71IG97trdg6GiMoVsa2v7qag2u--C88KUiP44dmdpLQYq12AJHLgdvt99MJwxRM9qOLRfTrFRxxasR--RAK2Fvm33g4UDAMkJzgjQyp32o9WPiwxCLXMpyWPUuTnVNZiKZ7EqBpsiKFUL7YVjNFmY-jt175D2P7ILaCHZEJ-dD_7mEBt80HeC3IyYTCOoLZ7udsTYApGiyD4rmn7jzpunIgsr533tIl3odjgmC-qPqJRCZ9xAlVsy6SZA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c26be9746baa4fa7b0e78762b1f7e5dd&_e=2UAf1kj9pc-uyvrB0o7GbLvJQa3cB8_XKSdZE3v1_3VT_xo4Qoc9pTX4mrL5dKGMd8AnUiDWgaXmCg7zvvQkpAaD8IcqAfn_Jpd7MCNbM1tz2E4erfDpWZOQN7iiAtoqbKSIZYfxXL-6zPNaKp-uzIpu_fEZdt6bMBeiOYix1bFFmUQD1IKm75CRT-l9CXEisou8TM2VlOeeewPM0Oyuve-QRhc14MOEycWkk1Tc1IrMb5DjYW1T8F6chP-9uyLzBaG63TF2RDdx20lzFwQREK1lZf3AJsgwYM5EYTQ14CeWaHH2JSD_a7_7kc1vdW8cBDaf2TZjfUOizBHvFqFR_d_AYQqfB2PtRXrorwSfNwoMBIwaHYNq4DeaZ53Tdh9LZgHSSpbH7Eyhj1ROpTul1w%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. By law, the maximum amount an individual may contribute is $2,700 ($5,400 per couple) per election (for each primary and general election). Federal multi-candidate PACs may contribute $5,000 per election. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to report he name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions aggregate to or exceed $200 during an election cycle. Contributions by corporations, national banks, foreign nationals (non-green card holders), labor unions, federal government contractors, and minors under the age of 18 are prohibited. clean_body: Leah Vukmir has been a principal driver of these reforms that improve things for families all across our state. She is motivated, experienced, and a.. Friend, During my years representing Wisconsinites, I have seen our state take positive steps forward. What was once a blue state has become a beacon for conservative values, strong families, limited government, and lower taxes. Leah Vukmir has been a principal driver of these reforms that improve things for families all across our state. She is motivated, experienced, and a determined leader. Guided by her dedication to her family and to Wisconsin, she has a proven track record that we can count on. That’s why Congressman Jim Sensenbrenner and I are proud to endorse Leah for U.S. Senate. In the State Senate, Leah has been instrumental in cutting taxes, turning a deficit into a surplus with the passage of Act 10, and banning late-term abortions. But knowing Leah, she’s only just getting started. With Leah in the Senate, we’ll be able to put patients back in control of their health care decisions, take more Americans from welfare to work, and continue to defend our precious unborn. We need Leah in the Senate, and that’s why we’re going to stand with her every step of the way. ** Congressman Sensenbrenner and I would like to invite you to a campaign rally for Leah on Friday, July 6 at 5:30 p.m. in Pewaukee. We’re hoping conservative activists from all across the state will join us as we unite behind her because we know she is the best candidate to take on Senator Baldwin this fall. Friend, I hope you will join me in supporting Leah Vukmir and I look forward to seeing you on Friday evening. On Wisconsin, Paul Paid for by Leah for Senate

**Our motto is “Live Free or Die,” but we don’t necessarily have the freedom to choose when it comes to our children's education.**

name: Akilah Ensley, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Doubling our efforts
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3037/9e00690/46bc0e00/2402d6e4/1476752691/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&source=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx")
This is it, friends --

This Saturday is our _last_ major fundraising deadline before the primary so we're doubling our efforts to make sure we have the opportunity to rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us -- and not just the special interests.

You shouldn't have to be a millionaire or billionaire to serve the people of our state. And unlike Andrew's deep-pocketed opponents, this campaign isn't self-funded -- because it's fueled by the momentum of grassroots supporters like you.

The people who represent the people should look like the people. And that's exactly why we need someone like Andrew Gillum, the son of a bus driver and construction worker, to fight for everyday Floridians.

**[Can we count on you to chip in $5 before our end-of-quarter deadline on Saturday to help us win? The state of Florida will match any donation up to $250 if you are a Florida voter, doubling our efforts!](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3037/9e00690/46bc0e00/2402d6e7/1476752691/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1560&refcode=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+chip+in++ask++bef")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3037/9e00690/46bc0e00/2402d6e6/1476752691/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1560&refcode=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_content=3+-+Express+Donate++ask+")
[Express Donate: $50](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3037/9e00690/46bc0e00/2402d6f9/1476752691/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1560&refcode=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_content=4+-+Express+Donate++ask2+")
[Express Donate: $100](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3037/9e00690/46bc0e00/2402d6f8/1476752691/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiMTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1560&refcode=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_content=5+-+Express+Donate++ask3+")
[Or donate another amounT](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3037/9e00690/46bc0e00/2402d6fb/1476752691/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1560&refcode=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&express_lane=true&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amounT")
Listen, the data shows that Andrew can win this race -- we just need to reach the voters to do so. And that's going to take a lot of resources and boots on the ground to connect with every Floridian and make sure their voices are being heard.

We can't come up short this month. It could mean the difference of reaching the voters we need to bring it home this August -- or not -- and the latter isn't an option.

**[We're so close to electing a true progressive this August to represent Florida families in the general election. So chip in $5 before Saturday at midnight to have your contribution matched.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3037/9e00690/46bc0e00/2402d6fa/1476752691/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-june-eoq?gpsid=13_55_1560&refcode=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=7+-+Wersquore+so+close+to+electing+a+true+pr")**

Akilah Ensley

name: IN Senate HQ
subject: BREAKING: Indiana "ground zero for Trump"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
President Trump and his allies are all in for Republican Rep. Mike Braun, and if we're going to win here in November, we need our grassroots team to be all in for Joe. |
---

| | | _"INDIANA SENATE RACE BECOMING 'GROUND ZERO' FOR TRUMP"_
\-- WIBC Indianapolis
---
URGENT, Peter: President Trump and his allies are all in for Republican Rep. Mike Braun, and if we're going to win here in November, we need our grassroots team to be all in for Joe. **Will you rush a contribution right now to help Joe fight back against the onslaught of attacks from Donald Trump and his extreme GOP allies?**

---

****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e32/7377f838/3cd31556/51f9dd5c/3095117968/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fight-back-gop-attacks?refcode=20180625.2nd")****
Remember, VP Mike Pence has already been to Indiana to fundraise for Rep. Braun twice -- and it hasn't even been two months since the primary! **At this pace, Pence will be able to shake down his donors for _millions_ to pour directly into Rep. Braun's war chest!**

The reason all these heavy hitters are getting involved is simple: **Rep. Mike Braun will sign off on all of the most extreme parts of the Trump-McConnell-Koch agenda, no questions asked.** And that's just what they want: a loyal copy machine who will do exactly what he's told.

**That 's why we're fighting tooth and nail to keep Indiana's Democratic Senator -- Joe Donnelly -- in the Senate. [Will you pitch in to make sure Joe can BEAT extremists like GOP Rep. Mike Braun on Election Day?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e32/7377f838/3cd31556/51f9dd61/3095117968/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fight-back-gop-attacks?refcode=20180625.2nd&amount=10")**

Thanks, Peter.
Team Donnelly

name: MATCH-ALERT@bobcasey.com
subject: Trump's all in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
**CRITICAL MATCH DEADLINE EXPIRING TOMORROW**

Chip in $5 to support Bob Casey __now__ and every dollar will be doubled!

[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey-match?refcode=em_20180625_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
It is absolutely crucial that we protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat this year, team. But right now Bob isn't on track to meet his $15,000 match goal, and the deadline is TOMORROW. President Trump has his sights set on PA, a state he won in 2016, and he's going to go _all in_ to support his hand-picked candidate's campaign, so we need to take advantage of this opportunity before it's gone.

Trump has already recorded an expensive robocall for Congressman Lou Barletta, appeared with Barletta at rallies and used his Twitter account to attack Bob. A pro-Trump Super PAC is planning to spend $100 million to unseat Democrats like Bob this year, so we have to be prepared to fight back even harder against the president's attempts to flip Pennsylvania.

**You 've probably heard that Democrats can take back the Senate in 2018, but that _cannot happen_ if we don't re-elect Bob Casey.**

Bob is counting on grassroots donors like you to step up and help meet this $15,000 goal before the match expires tomorrow: **can you chip in $5 (becomes $10) to defend Pennsylvania 's Democratic Senate seat and help turn the Senate blue in 2018?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey-match?refcode=em_20180625_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 (Becomes $50)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey-match?refcode=em_20180625_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 (Becomes $100)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey-match?refcode=em_20180625_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey-match?refcode=em_20180625_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey-match?refcode=em_20180625_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6674/51dbcc2a/45a966f/3a45425/3105112492/VEsP/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6674/51dbcc2a/45a966f/3a45426/3105112492/VEsHBQ/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6674/51dbcc2a/45a966f/3a45427/3105112492/VEsHBA/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6674/51dbcc2a/45a966f/3a45420/3105112492/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.
clean_body: CRITICAL MATCH DEADLINE EXPIRING TOMORROW Chip in $5 to support Bob Casey now and every dollar will be doubled! "" It is absolutely crucial that we protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat this year, team. But right now Bob isn't on track to meet his $15,000 match goal, and the deadline is TOMORROW. President Trump has his sights set on PA, a state he won in 2016, and he's going to go all in to support his hand-picked candidate's campaign, so we need to take advantage of this opportunity before it's gone. Trump has already recorded an expensive robocall for Congressman Lou Barletta, appeared with Barletta at rallies and used his Twitter account to attack Bob. A pro-Trump Super PAC is planning to spend $100 million to unseat Democrats like Bob this year, so we have to be prepared to fight back even harder against the president's attempts to flip Pennsylvania. You 've probably heard that Democrats can take back the Senate in 2018, but that cannot happen if we don't re-elect Bob Casey. Bob is counting on grassroots donors like you to step up and help meet this $15,000 goal before the match expires tomorrow: can you chip in $5 (becomes $10) to defend Pennsylvania 's Democratic Senate seat and help turn the Senate blue in 2018? If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration. Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Kathy Manning
subject: The worst of Washington, but the best in one another
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | These past few weeks have tested our country and our values in ways that a few years ago seemed unimaginable. Lately, it seems like we're seeing the worst from Washington. From attempts to gut protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions to the unconscionable ripping apart families at our border, the challenges of a dysfunctional Washington continue to build up. We're seeing what can happen when Washington and Congress let partisan bickering and misplaced priorities stop us from solving tough problems. Too many Washington politicians putting party over country and too few courageous leaders stepping up to not only solve problems, but protect our values at the same time. We can and must do both. But as I continue to travel across this district, thousands of you are speaking out, helping spread the word, and joining our campaign to bring common sense, principled leadership back to Congress. We know we can do better. We know North Carolina and our country deserve better. Every day, more people join our forward-looking campaign for courageous leadership in Washington. We may be seeing the worst out of Washington, but **_we are seeing the best in one another and for that, I couldn 't be more grateful._** | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427869/e3b7d3/5c8796f3/2555e7ac/672320655/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180625ld?refcode=kme180625ld_m")
---
From meeting with voters at their homes in Lexington, conversations over coffee in Greensboro, and visiting small businesses in Thomasville, it continues to be a privilege to hear from so many North Carolinians who are energized, engaged, and ready for a Congress that reflects our values and is willing to get hard things done. They are ready for a representative who isn't beholden to corporate special interests or their party's leadership -- they want an independent voice that will put North Carolina families first.
[](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427869/e3b7d3/5c8796f3/2555e7ac/672320655/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180625ld?refcode=kme180625ld_m")
---
Between Greensboro Grasshoppers baseball games and stopping by barbecue restaurants in Statesville, I've heard from people on either side of the political aisle about the issues that are keeping them up at night. They want better paying jobs, more affordable healthcare, lower prescription drug prices, good public schools for their kids, and leaders who share their values.
Each day, we're picking up more and more grassroots support across North Carolina. We've continued to knock on doors in neighborhoods, make phone calls to voters, and register students to vote in this upcoming election.
[](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427869/e3b7d3/5c8796f3/2555e7ac/672320655/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180625ld?refcode=kme180625ld_m")
---
I also couldn't be more proud of some pivotal endorsements this month. The League of Conservation Voters Action Fund recognized our campaign for our commitment to defend North Carolina's environment. I know a healthy environment and a strong economy go hand-in-hand, and I will champion both in Congress.
Last week, Governor Roy Cooper endorsed our campaign, highlighting my _" proven track record of bringing people together"_ and our campaign's emphasis on cutting _" through the partisan dysfunction in Washington."_ I'm proud to stand with Governor Cooper to fight for strong public schools, affordable health care, and an economy that works for all North Carolinians.
**But perhaps my favorite endorsement is from a special baby in High Point named Royce!** I'm working hard to make sure he gets to grow up in a safe community with good public schools and leaders who care about his success!
[](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427869/e3b7d3/5c8796f3/2555e7ac/672320655/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180625ld?refcode=kme180625ld_m")
---
It's been a busy month as we lay the groundwork for a winning campaign. While there's nothing but bad news lately out of Washington, there is plenty of good news and reason to be hopeful in North Carolina. I'm running for Congress to bring back common sense and courageous leadership to Washington, and there are thousands of people across our district who are standing with us.
_Together, we are going to put Congress on the right track._
[**You can help us continue to build our momentum by making a contribution toward our fast approaching FEC deadline, even if it 's just $5 >>**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427869/e3b7d3/5c8796f3/2555e7ac/672320655/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180625ld?refcode=kme180625ld_m")
Every vote matters and every contribution gets us one step closer. Thank you for your support.
Kathy Manning

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427869/e3b7d3/5c8796f3/2555e793/672320655/VEsA/ "https://manning.bsd.net/unsubscribe") [www.kathymanning2018.com](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427869/e3b7d3/5c8796f3/2555e792/672320655/VEsB/ "https://www.kathymanning2018.com/")
